author: Ryan Law
title: What Triggers AI Overviews? 86 Factors and 146 Million SERPs Analyzed
content:
Ahrefs analyzed 146 million SERPs and explored how often AI Overviews appeared for 86 different keyword traits, from YMYL to CPC to query length.

Key findings:

Overall AI Overview Trigger Rate: AI Overviews appear on 20.5% of all SERPs (29,991,998 out of 146,122,391).

Intent Type: 99.9% of keywords that trigger AI Overviews are Informational in intent.

Category Performance: The categories with highest AIO share are Science (43.6%), Health (43.0%), Pets & Animals (36.8%), and People & Society (35.3%), while the categories with lowest AIO share are Shopping (3.2%), Real Estate (5.8%), Sports (14.8%), and News (15.1%).

Medical/YMYL Queries: AI Overviews trigger very frequently for YMYL queries, and especially medical YMYL queries.
